message:
test(core): property-based tests for webhook, simulation, recorder_export, restore_layout

Adds 73 new proptest + unit tests across 4 modules:
- proptest_webhook (14 tests): WebhookTemplate serde, endpoint config, render_template invariants, event filtering
- proptest_simulation (30 tests): EventAction/ResizeTimelineStage serde + ordering, flame_samples/stage_summary invariants
- proptest_recorder_export (21 tests): ExportFormat serde, ExportRequest builder methods, required_tier access control
- proptest_restore_layout (8 tests): RestoreConfig serde roundtrips, default values, partial JSON handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
